generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you understand the importance of a strong national defense. But have you considered how over-reliance on foreign allies might be compromising our strategic autonomy? Recent reports show that our allies are increasingly reluctant to share critical intelligence unless we meet their demands. It's time we invest in our own capabilities to ensure we're never caught off guard. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
